title: Build Pack - Very useful build mods pack
description: Modpack for a simpler building process.
body:
## Mainly based on the Axiom and World Edit mods
![desc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7acea7f6d2f9062b621ee1eb08785dc948351215.png)
### Check all list of mods
<details>
<summary>Actual mod list</summary>

- Sodium
- MaLiLib
- **Axiom**
- **Litemoretica**
- Fabric API
- **Litematica**
- Text Placeholder API
- Lithium
- **Accurate Block Placement Reborn**
- Mod Menu
- **Basalt Blocks**
- Animatica
- BetterF3
- **Bridging Mod**
- Cherished Worlds
- Controlling
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Essential Mod
- Entity Culling
- **Inventory Profiles Next**
- **ItemSwapper**
- Zoomify
- **WorldEdit**


</details>
